message:
test(bidi,mux): add 80+ unit tests for bidi modules and mux data types

Bidi crate: add tests to 4 previously untested modules:
- direction.rs (18 tests): Direction::with_level, opposite, as_bidi_class, DirectionIter
- level.rs (23 tests): Level methods, least_greater_even/odd boundary cases, MAX_DEPTH
- level_stack.rs (19 tests): LevelStack push/pop/depth, Override apply, max depth behavior
- bidi_brackets.rs (13 tests): BracketType traits, table invariants, pair symmetry

Mux crate: add tests to 4 files:
- pane.rs (28 tests): PaneConstraints, CollapsePriority, PerformAssignmentResult,
  SearchResult, Pattern, PatternType, CloseReason
- tab.rs (26 tests): SplitDirection, SplitSize, SplitRequest, PositionedSplit,
  SplitDirectionAndSize, PaneNode, SerdeUrl, PaneEntry
- domain.rs (9 tests): DomainState, SplitSource
- client.rs (13 tests): ClientId, ClientInfo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
